name: 11p11_2_Potocki_Shaffer_SD
description: 11p11.2 segmental duplication region flanking the Potocki-Shaffer syndrome interval (EXT2, ALX4, PHF21A). Paired SD blocks of ~150 kb at ~98% identity drive the recurrent 11p11.2 microdeletion (proximal 11p deletion syndrome).

architecture.internal_structure: Paired SD blocks of ~150 kb at ~98% identity flank the Potocki-Shaffer interval; intervening unique region harbours EXT2, ALX4, PHF21A, PRR5L.
